---
title: "3-Month Recomposition Plan"
author: "Ziang Liu"
date: 2026-04-06
categories: []
# image: "thumbnail.jpg"
---

## Goal

|Metric|Current|Target|
|-|-|-|-|
|Body Weight| 70 kg | 67 kg |
|Body Fat (est)| 22% | 17% |
|Bench (1RM; est) | 75 kg | 90 kg |
|Squat (1RM; est) | 100 kg | 120 kg |
|Pull-up (max reps) | 5 | 10 |

## Training Plan

- 4-Day Upper/Lower Split
- 2 Cardio Sessions per Week (30 minutes each)
